prompt:
You are an Amazon SP-API listing specialist and an expert at writing search-engine-optimized (SEO) Amazon listings. For the product below, write an item_name of AT MOST 75 characters and a title_differentiation of AT MOST 125 characters. Always return both, each within its own limit. === PRODUCT CONTEXT === SKU: SON-RUBBER-SLUICEBOX-RIFFLES Product Type: METAL_DETECTOR Brand (from catalog): ASR Outdoor Existing Title: ASR Outdoor Aluminum Sluice Box with Rubber TPR Riffle Matting, Gold Prospecting Equipment, 34 Inch Description: Make your gold prospecting recovery efforts simple, easy and effortless. This ASR Outdoor lightweight sluice box for gold prospecting combines our highly rated TPR rubber sluice box matting in a aluminum alloy, rust free body allowing you higher yield gold recovery from the raw material pay dirt you wash through it. Utilizing three distinctive riffle patterns throughout the sediment channel, the rubber sluice box matting maximizes your chances of catching gold of different shapes and sizes as they behave very differently in a sluice.

The specialized gold prospecting rubber sluice matting features: Hungarian, V-shaped and square riffle gold traps that are built-in to create water turbulence in the sediment channel. They will trap gold flake and small gold flour in a very effective way that helps to increase your gold prospecting recovery efforts. Coarse pieces will be caught easily in the Hungarian riffle traps while other smaller gold pieces may float over and get caught in the V shape before it has a chance to run out of your sluice. Using a hybrid sluice design like this one gives you the best chance to maximize your gold recovery for various types of gold.

Easy to maneuver, the 34 inch sluice box design gives you ample run out and enough surface area to make leveling and securing simple when the sluice box is placed in river or stream, allowing water to flow freely and without interruption through the 10 inch sediment channel. The gold sluice box comes with a handy shoulder strap that attaches to sluice box via included carabiners, making movement from one gold claim to the next easy for the operator. Experiment with different angles and water speeds to find the best combination for your particular gold shape, size and conditions Search Terms: gold rush panning prospectors tool paydirt fine recovery portable stream sluce miners moss beginner 10 inch pan classifier set gift mining kit pay dirt accessories Features: - GOLD PROSPECTING EQUIPMENT SLUICE BOX: Lightweight aluminum construction and precut TPR sluice box matting make this sluice box easy to deploy in the field come your next gold rush adventure; quality materials and unique riffle matting help to increase gold recovery efforts - HIGH YIELD GOLD RECOVERY: Made from flexible TPR, the specialized rubber sluice box matting features 3 distinctive gold flake traps; Hungarian, V-shaped and square riffles that work efficiently to increase gold nuggets and gold flake recovery - EASY TO USE SLUICE BOX: Once assembled, simply place the sluice box in river or stream, ensuring its level and secure allowing water to flow freely and without interruption through the 10 inch sediment channel - PORTABLE SLUICE BOX DESIGN: The gold sluice box comes with a handy shoulder strap that attaches to sluice box via included carabiners, making movement from one field site to the next a breeze - SLUICE BOX SPECIFICATIONS: Assembled Dimensions: 34.5 x 14 x 2.5 inches; Wide Mouth Flange: 14 inches; Weight: 5.20lbs; Material: TPR, Aluminum; Note: Some Assembly Required === ITEM_NAME (title, <= 75 chars) === Write a concise, keyword-rich, SEO-optimized item_name — a shopper-facing title, not a part number. Derive these tokens, then assemble the title from them in order: ${brand} ${pack_size}-${pack_size_unit} ${size} ${color} ${name} - brand: use the catalog brand above. - pack_size + pack_size_unit: parse from the existing title (e.g. "4-pk", or a dimension like 13" -> pack_size "13", pack_size_unit "in"). Omit if absent. - size, color, name: parse from the existing title (name = what the product IS). Drop any token you cannot determine; never emit the SKU, MPN, or a part number. Lead with the brand; condense to AT MOST 75 characters. Amazon schema guidance: Provide a title for the item that may be customer facing === TITLE_DIFFERENTIATION (item highlight, 100–125 chars) === Write a compact, comma-separated list of the product's strongest, most search-relevant features/benefits — NOT a full sentence, NOT the brand, and NOT a repeat of the item_name (e.g. "Set of 6, Dishwasher Safe, 8oz, BPA-Free, Stackable"). Use the available space: aim for 100–125 characters, leading with the highest-value keywords. Never pad with filler or repeat a point. Capitalize the first letter of every word (e.g. "Natural Wood Grain", but keep acronyms like "US" fully uppercase). Do not use special characters — spell out "&" as "and" and "=" as "is" (e.g. "Yellow Is Real", "Works On US And International Currency"); only hyphen, double quote, and apostrophe are allowed. Amazon schema guidance: Provide product features or benefit driven phrases, not a full sentence. Information will appear only when the item name is under 75 characters. Do not repeat information already in the item name. === RETURN === Return ONLY a valid JSON object, no markdown fences, in this exact shape: {"item_name": "<= 75 char title", "tokens": {"brand": "", "pack_size": "", "pack_size_unit": "", "size": "", "color": "", "name": ""}, "title_differentiation": "<= 125 char benefit phrase"}

anthropic.item_name: ASR Outdoor 34 Inch Aluminum Sluice Box Gold Prospecting
